fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies a short description of the resource group.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total capacity for this resource group. It is accumulated from the individual resources.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and/or chargeable transactions.

fields.name: Qty. on Order (Job)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the capacity of the resource group is assigned to jobs with the status Order.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable transactions.

fields.name: Qty. Quoted (Job)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the capacity of the resource group is assigned to jobs with the status Quote.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable transactions.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the filter that filters by a measuring unit.
If the field contains a unit of measure filter, the amounts in the following fields are filtered according to the relevant unit of measure:
Qty. on Order (Job)

Qty. Quoted (Job)

Usage (Qty.)

Usage (Cost)

Usage (Price)

Sales (Qty.)

Sales (Cost)

Sales (Price)

fields.name: Usage (Qty.)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies, based on quantity, how much of the resources that are assigned to the corresponding resource group have been used. The amounts are accumulated from the individual resources. You can record resources usage in the resource journal by selecting Usage for the Entry Type field or in the job journal. All entries in the job journal are recorded as usage.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Usage (Cost)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies, based on cost, how much of the resources that are assigned to the corresponding resource group have been used. The amounts are accumulated from the individual resources. You can record resources usage in the resource journal by selecting Usage for the Entry Type field or in the job journal. All entries in the job journal are recorded as usage.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Usage (Price)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies, based on price, how much of the resources that are assigned to the corresponding resource group have been used. The amounts are accumulated from the individual resources. You can record resources usage in the resource journal by selecting Usage for the Entry Type field or in the job journal. All entries in the job journal are recorded as usage.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Sales (Qty.)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies, based on quantity, how much capacity of the resources that are assigned to the corresponding resource group has been sold. The amounts are accumulated from the individual resources. You can record resources sales in the resource journal by selecting Sales for the Entry Type field or in a sales invoice. All entries in the sales invoice are recorded as sales.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Sales (Cost)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies, based on cost, how much capacity of the resources that are assigned to the corresponding resource group has been sold. The amounts are accumulated from the individual resources. You can record resources sales in the resource journal by selecting Sales for the Entry Type field or in a sales invoice. All entries in the sales invoice are recorded as sales.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Sales (Price)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies, based on prices, how much capacity of the resources that are assigned to the corresponding resource group has been sold. The amounts are accumulated from the individual resources. You can record resources sales in the resource journal by selecting Sales for the Entry Type field or in a sales invoice. All entries in the sales invoice are recorded as sales.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Chargeable Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the amounts of chargeable and nonchargeable transactions. You can use this field in connection with the Usage fields in this table.
Select to see only the chargeable usage or chargeable sales for a resource group. Clear to see only the nonchargeable usage or nonchargeable sales for a resource group. Leave the check box blank to see both chargeable and nonchargeable usage or nonchargeable sales for a resource group.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the dimension value code that the resource group is linked to.
The field is filled from a journal line or a document.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the dimension value code that the resource group is linked to.
The field is filled from a journal line or a document.

fields.name: No. of Resources Assigned
fields.tooltip:
Displays the number of resources that are contained in a resource group.

Additional Information

To add a resource to the group, on the Home tab, choose New Resource. You can review the list of resources included in a resource group. In the Resource Group table, choose the field. The Resource List window opens and lists the resources in the group.
